drawer.limitReached: limit reached. Upgrade to create more.

landing.heroTagline: The specialized design tool for YouTubers. Upload your face, drag in elements, and generate high-CTR thumbnails in seconds. No generic templates—just results.
landing.powerUpTitle: Power up your channel with Vizion
landing.powerUpDescription: Everything you need to build viral thumbnails—avatars, backgrounds, and elements—all in one place.
landing.lovedByCreatorsDescription: Join thousands of content creators who trust Vizion to create stunning thumbnails.
landing.simplePricingDescription: Start for free, upgrade when you grow.

youtubeFeedPreview.title: See how your thumbnails look on YouTube
youtubeFeedPreview.description: Your thumbnails will appear exactly like this in the YouTube feed, optimized for maximum clicks.

video1.title: 5 Terrifying Stories Based on Real Events

video2.title: DJI Osmo Action 6 Review - Better Than iPhone?

video3.title: How to Cook the Perfect Lasagna

video4.title: My First Victory Royale - I Can't Believe It!

landing.examplesDescription: Real thumbnails created by creators using Vizion, optimized for YouTube's algorithm.

step1.title: Upload Your Video
step1.subtitle: Simply drag and drop your video or paste a URL. Toggle the viral mode switch for AI-optimized thumbnails designed to maximize clicks.

step2.title: AI Processing in Real-Time
step2.subtitle: Watch as our AI analyzes your video content, extracts key frames, transcribes audio, and generates optimized thumbnails—all in under 3 minutes.

step3.title: Get 4 Unique Thumbnails & Titles
step3.subtitle: Receive four distinct thumbnail variations with optimized titles, ready to download and use. Save your favorites to your library instantly.

yourIdentityAutomated.title: Your identity, automated
yourIdentityAutomated.description: Upload your face once and let AI integrate it into any thumbnail with the perfect expression.

faceLibrary.title: Face library
faceLibrary.detail: Save your best angles and expressions.

lightingMatch.title: Lighting match
lightingMatch.detail: AI adjusts your face to match the thumbnail background.

noNewShoots.title: No new shoots
noNewShoots.detail: Reuse your photos without having to pose again.

designThatGetsClicks.title: Design that gets clicks
designThatGetsClicks.description: Specialized tools for visual hierarchy and contrast to stand out in the YouTube feed.

stylesThatHook.title: Styles that hook
stylesThatHook.description: Backgrounds, gradients, and text presets optimized to be read instantly.

textThatCutsThroughNoise.title: Text that cuts through noise
textThatCutsThroughNoise.description: Typefaces and layouts with shadows and strokes designed to pop on any background.

smartLayouts.title: Smart Layouts
smartLayouts.description: Place key elements, screenshots, and products with professional composition guides.

remixAndScale.title: Remix & Scale
remixAndScale.description: Don't settle for one. Generate variations and remix until you find the winner.

aiRemix.title: AI Remix
aiRemix.detail: Change the style or background while keeping your face consistent.

productivity.label: Productivity
productivity.sub: From idea to result in 2 minutes

howItWorks.title: How Vizion Works
howItWorks.description: A professional workflow designed for speed. Go from idea to publish-ready thumbnail in four simple steps.

startWithIdentity.title: Start with your Identity
startWithIdentity.description: Upload your face once and reuse it freely. Choose expressions that match your video's vibe—excited, serious, or surprised—without taking new photos every time.

addElements.title: Add your Elements
addElements.description: Place your product, screenshots, or key visuals. Upload generic assets or branded files to fill the composition.

hookWithText.title: Hook with Text
hookWithText.description: Add punchy titles and subtitles. Select from high-converting text styles and placements that ensure your thumbnail is readable and click-worthy.

styleAndBackground.title: Style & Background
styleAndBackground.description: Set the scene with gradients, solid colors, or AI-generated backgrounds. Define the overall visual style, then hit generate to bring it all together.

testimonial1.text: Vizion has completely changed my workflow. I used to spend hours on thumbnails, now it takes minutes.
testimonial1.author: Sarah Jenkins

testimonial2.text: The quality of the AI generation is mind-blowing. It understands exactly what I want from a simple prompt.
testimonial2.author: Mike Chen

testimonial3.text: Finally, a tool that actually helps me get more clicks. My CTR has increased by 40% since using Vizion.
testimonial3.author: Jessica Lee

testimonial4.text: I've tried every thumbnail tool out there. Vizion is the only one that consistently delivers professional results.
testimonial4.author: David Park

testimonial5.text: The speed is incredible. I can iterate through dozens of ideas in the time it used to take me to make one.
testimonial5.author: Emma Wilson

testimonial6.text: My subscribers always comment on how great my thumbnails look now. This tool is a game changer.
testimonial6.author: Alex Rivera

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.invalidPriceId: Invalid Price ID: "{priceId}". This looks like a placeholder. Please update testPlans in Profile.tsx with real Stripe test Price IDs from your Stripe Dashboard (Test mode).
